title: Dutch Stew with Rye Crust
description: A hearty Dutch-inspired stew with a twist of rye crust. Perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine rye flour and water to form a dough. Knead for 10 minutes.
Roll out the dough to 1/4 inch thickness. Place in a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a large pot, sauté carrots, potatoes, and onions in a little bit of oil until tender.
Add Dutch creamy sauce and vegetable broth to the pot. Stir well.
Pour the stew mixture into the rye crust-lined baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
